title: Error loading a stylesheet when adding custom component
symptom: When trying to add a custom component to a project, an error loading a stylesheet occurs, causing the component to fail. This issue does not appear when using an empty project.
applies_when: Adding a custom component to a non-empty project
Previous modifications made to the project
not_this_if: Using an empty project without previous modifications
root_cause: The error occurs due to conflicts or issues arising from previous modifications in the project, such as the presence of an NPM plugin that interferes with the loading of stylesheets for the custom component.
fix_steps: Remove any conflicting NPM plugins from the project
Try adding the custom component again
Check for any remaining errors in the console
agent_instruction: Remove the NPM plugin that may be causing conflicts and retry adding the custom component.
